categories.description: Top-level categorization of a keyword, e.g. 'devops', 'saas'.

displayName.description: The display name of the category, e.g. 'Database', 'Programming Languages'.

keywordsDictionary.description: Global keyword definitions map with metadata and category assignment.

displayName.description: The display name of the keyword, e.g. 'JavaScript', 'Amazon AWS'.

items.description: A list of aliases that can also map to this keyword, e.g. 'jscript', 'amazon_aws'.

category.description: Must match a category key from the top-level categories object.
